gaps.acceptance_criteria: 0 manual tax items, 0 county/property capture items, live county tax needs_capture_count=0.
gaps.technical_risk: Official county sites may block automated lookup; manual browser capture must stay approval-safe.
gaps.test_plan: Run daily acquisition report and inspect county queues/status.
gaps.title: Official county tax/property detail not verified for selected real estate
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Matthew could underwrite a property with wrong tax burden or hidden delinquency.
gaps.verification_evidence: live county tax verified 0; needs capture 0; manual queue 0
gaps.why_it_matters: Taxes, balances, delinquency, year built, square feet, and class/use drive real-estate underwriting.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: county_tax_capture_status needs_capture=0, errors=0, invalid_urls=0.
gaps.technical_risk: Capture parser must reject wrong hosts and avoid treating unverified data as official.
gaps.test_plan: Generate browser session, save official captures, import captures, rerun daily report.
gaps.title: County browser capture files are missing
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Tax/detail blockers remain open and reports stay proof-capped.
gaps.why_it_matters: The fallback capture path is required when direct county lookup is blocked.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: Every selected real-estate deal has parsed rent roll or T12 evidence and reconciliation.
gaps.technical_risk: Document import must remain local-only and label parsed docs as evidence, not verification.
gaps.test_plan: Import proof files, run proof import/reconciliation tests, rerun daily report.
gaps.title: Real-estate rent roll/T12/lease proof absent
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Bad deals can look safe because rent, NOI, vacancy, and expense reality are unknown.
gaps.verification_evidence: rent-roll/T12 parsed deals 0; selected real estate deals 0
gaps.why_it_matters: Cash flow and unit economics are only listing claims without document evidence.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: Selected business deals have core proof docs received/verified and underwriting_ready count equals selected count.
gaps.technical_risk: Business proof import must classify docs without marking them verified prematurely.
gaps.test_plan: Import tax/P&L/bank/owner-hours proof, run business proof tests, rerun daily report.
gaps.title: Business proof absent; no business is underwriting-ready
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Matthew may waste attention on owner-trap or fake-SDE businesses.
gaps.why_it_matters: Business SDE/revenue/autonomy are seller claims until proof arrives.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: All selected proof packets are explicitly approved or human-recorded sent, with audit events.
gaps.technical_risk: Lifecycle events must not authorize automatic contact by accident.
gaps.test_plan: Record approval events only with Matthew approval, run proof-request tests.
gaps.title: Proof request packets remain draft-only
gaps.user_or_business_impact: No seller/broker proof can be requested through the workflow yet.
gaps.why_it_matters: Proof packets are the bridge from report to due diligence, but they need explicit approval.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: Business and real estate missing_for_buffer are both 0.
gaps.technical_risk: Candidate promotion must dedupe and avoid scraping or seller contact.
gaps.test_plan: Import/promote approved saved-search candidates; run source volume monitor tests.
gaps.title: Source buffers are thin
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Tomorrow's report can fall below 3/3 again.
gaps.verification_evidence: business buffer gap 999; real estate buffer gap 999
gaps.why_it_matters: Daily reports need enough fresh supply after sent-history suppression.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: Approved candidate reserve has at least one available item in each lane after buffers are full.
gaps.technical_risk: Reserve accounting must not count sent/seen/queued duplicates.
gaps.test_plan: Add approved candidate pool records; run source replenishment tests.
gaps.title: Approved candidate reserve is empty
gaps.user_or_business_impact: The system is one run away from shortages.
gaps.why_it_matters: Reserve prevents report shortages after the next delivery consumes current fresh candidates.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: send_requested=true, send_dry_run=false, external_action_taken=true, sent_deals_recorded>0.
gaps.technical_risk: Live sends require pnpm/OpenClaw and channel health; dry-run must not masquerade as delivery.
gaps.test_plan: Run daily_run with send-lane-payloads only when delivery is approved/enabled.
gaps.title: Live Discord delivery not verified in this build pass
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Matthew may not receive morning reports even when local generation is green.
gaps.verification_evidence: send_requested False; dry_run False; external_action_taken False; sent_deals_recorded 0
gaps.why_it_matters: Formatted payloads are not the same as successful production delivery.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: pnpm is available and docs:list / openclaw dry-run commands can execute.
gaps.technical_risk: PATH/profile setup may differ between sandbox, launchd, and interactive shell.
gaps.test_plan: Check command availability and run a dry-run message payload.
gaps.title: pnpm/OpenClaw CLI unavailable in current shell
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Dry-run delivery falls back to local formatting only.
gaps.verification_method: build gap audit pnpm_available plus dry-run send result.
gaps.why_it_matters: Discord send and repo docs/test wrappers depend on pnpm.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: pdftotext and tesseract available, unreadable media count 0.
gaps.technical_risk: Tooling differs by host; parser must not silently use unreadable docs.
gaps.test_plan: Install/verify local tools and rerun proof import tests.
gaps.title: OCR/PDF extraction tools unavailable
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Scanned OMs or rent rolls remain unreadable and block underwriting.
gaps.verification_evidence: pdftotext False; tesseract False; unreadable media 0
gaps.why_it_matters: Proof PDFs/images need pdftotext/tesseract for local document intake.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: No selected operational JSON artifact contains the repo absolute path.
gaps.technical_risk: Path normalization must preserve enough provenance for debugging.
gaps.test_plan: Regenerate artifacts and scan JSON outputs for repo-root absolute paths.
gaps.title: Operational artifacts contain repo absolute paths
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Absolute local paths leak host details and make artifacts non-portable.
gaps.verification_evidence: artifacts with repo absolute paths 0: none
gaps.why_it_matters: Reports/status should be portable and safe to share inside repo-root refs.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: 0 images, 0 source-capture items, all report links have evidence.
gaps.technical_risk: Markdown scanning must catch both file reports and Discord payloads.
gaps.test_plan: Run report audit and source evidence import tests.
gaps.title: Report photo/link regression guard
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Broken/unfurling media or bad links reduce trust in the reports.
gaps.verification_evidence: markdown image embeds 0; report links 0; unevidenced links 0; queue 0; needs_more_info 0; errors 0
gaps.why_it_matters: Photos broke delivery before; links must be evidence-backed.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: Current reports contain no generated unicode or ascii ellipses.
gaps.technical_risk: Chunking should handle length without truncating user-facing report content.
gaps.test_plan: Scan file reports and run delivery chunking tests.
gaps.title: Generated report ellipsis/truncation guard
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Important proof gaps or deal killers can be hidden.
gaps.why_it_matters: Matthew asked for details, not shortened cards.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: All residential units have complete bed/bath from rent roll or official schedule.
gaps.technical_risk: Commercial and mixed-use assets need clear n/a vs unknown handling.
gaps.test_plan: Import rent roll/unit schedule and rerun report formatter tests.
gaps.title: Real-estate unit bed/bath proof still incomplete
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Reports show the structure, but some unit bath details remain unknown until rent-roll proof.
gaps.why_it_matters: Unit-level bedrooms/bathrooms affect rent comparability and lender/property risk.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: All selected deals have confidence_score >=45 or are excluded from pursuit lane.
gaps.technical_risk: Confidence should rise only from proof, not optimistic assumptions.
gaps.test_plan: Import proof, rerun scoring, inspect selected_deals confidence.
gaps.title: Selected deal confidence remains too low
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Daily attention is spent on candidates, not actionable pursuits.
gaps.why_it_matters: Every selected deal is still proof-capped.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: Pending proof queue is clear after imported docs are verified or rejected.
gaps.technical_risk: Verification events must be append-only and reviewer-attributed.
gaps.test_plan: Import sample/current proof, build queue, record review events, rerun tests.
gaps.title: Proof verification queue has no active proof to review
gaps.user_or_business_impact: The workflow cannot graduate any deal to underwriting.
gaps.why_it_matters: Verification queue is clear because no proof has arrived, not because deals are proven.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: Incentive-heavy selected assets carry official proof or are capped/flagged.
gaps.technical_risk: Funding claims need official award/source verification before recommendation.
gaps.test_plan: Collect official grant/HTC proof; rerun report and funding checks.
gaps.title: Historic grant/tax-credit claims unverified
gaps.user_or_business_impact: A deal can look attractive only because of unproven credits/grants.
gaps.verification_method: real_estate_report missing proof and grant/incentive language.
gaps.why_it_matters: Variety Theater economics may depend on incentives.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: Selected deals have verified/received seller financing terms or are clearly no-go.
gaps.technical_risk: Terms must be written proof, not listing optimism.
gaps.test_plan: Import seller-financing proof or record no-go; rerun funding/financial eval.
gaps.title: Seller-financing terms unverified
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Cash-to-close may exceed Matthew's posture.
gaps.verification_method: report Missing Proof and Seller Financing sections.
gaps.why_it_matters: Capital fit often depends on seller note/down payment terms.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: Required acquisition policy docs exist.
gaps.technical_risk: Docs must match runtime behavior without stale instructions.
gaps.test_plan: Check policy files and run validate_data.
gaps.title: Core policy/docs surfaces present
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Future runs can regress if policy files disappear.
gaps.why_it_matters: Operators need clear rules for links, presentation, source volume, and proof labels.

gaps.acceptance_criteria: Current report has at least 3 selected deals per lane or explicit shortage warning.
gaps.technical_risk: Shortage must be warning, not silent failure.
gaps.test_plan: Run daily_run and inspect delivery summary/status.
gaps.title: Daily report lane fullness
gaps.user_or_business_impact: Partial reports reduce usefulness of the morning scan.
gaps.why_it_matters: The top-level promise is three business and three real-estate candidates when available.
